'''Operation: Shadowstrike''' was a mission put together by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to retrieve the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Kala Kevv]] (codenamed [[Prodigal-One]]) and his [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] (codenamed [[Prodigal-Two]]) on the unexplored [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[NCW-781]].
The [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]] had to complete their mission before the arrival of an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] in the [[NCW-781 system/Legends|system]].
